title: Problem Data
description: Stores the problems (and their solutions) associated with a module.

uniqueId.description: The unique ID of the problem. This MUST be auto-generated based on the problem information to maintain consistency.

name.description: The name of the problem, with NO source info whatsoever. Names should be unique within a source; if multiple problems share a name, add a clarifier.

source.description: Stores the problems (and their solutions) associated with a module.

difficulty.description: The difficulty of a problem, _relative to the module it is in_.

isStarred.description: Whether or not the problem should be starred in the module problem table.

tags.description: Tags for the problem. Reuse existing tags when possible.

statement.description: Required Markdown + TeX ($...$, $$...$$) shown on the on-site problem page. All problems must include their full statement.

author.description: Optional attribution line shown next to the contest source on the problem page.

interaction.description: Optional answer UI on the problem page. Omit or use type "none" for proof problems or AoPS-only stubs.

correct.description: For type "integer": canonical answer string (trimmed; numeric equality also accepted).

choices.description: For type "mcq": list of choice labels (Markdown allowed in strings).

solutionReveal.description: How “Show me the solution” behaves on the problem page. Defaults to external link using the problem `url` (e.g. AoPS).

url.description: For mode "external": link target (defaults to problem `url`).

markdown.description: For mode "inline": Markdown + TeX solution body revealed in-page.

solutionMetadata.description: Metadata storing information about the internal solution.
